children.text: to develop the physical infrastructure necessary for regional cooperation among the countries of the South Caucasus and Central Asia; and
to encourage closer economic relations and to facilitate the removal of impediments to cross-border commerce among those countries and the United States and other developed nations.
Activities by the Export-Import Bank to complete the review process for eligibility for financing under the Export-Import Bank Act of 1945 [ et seq.].12 U.S.C. 635
The provision of insurance, reinsurance, financing, or other assistance by the United States International Development Finance Corporation.
Assistance under (relating to the Trade and Development Agency).section 2421 of this title

children.heading: Activities supported
children.label: c Activities supported
children.text: Activities that may be supported by programs under subsection (b) include promoting actively the participation of United States companies and investors in the planning, financing, and construction of infrastructure for communications, transportation, including air transportation, and energy and trade including highways, railroads, port facilities, shipping, banking, insurance, telecommunications networks, and gas and oil pipelines.
